name: phase2_revision_practical_validation
summary: First live revision-focused practical validation suite. Each scenario seeds a concept, then revises it in place while preserving design identity and scoped targets.

scenarios.analyzePrompt: Analyze the current song for sections, beat windows, phrase cues, and energy shifts.
scenarios.seedPrompt: Design a single Chorus 1 concept for SpiralTrees with broad warm wash coverage and a steady supportive glow. Keep it readable and do not turn it into obvious spiral motion yet.
scenarios.revisionPrompt: Revise this concept in place so SpiralTrees now read with flowing spiral motion and a larger chorus payoff. Keep the same target and section scope.

scenarios.analyzePrompt: Analyze the current song for sections, beat windows, phrase cues, and energy shifts.
scenarios.seedPrompt: Create a Final Chorus concept for Star as a strong pinwheel-style radial spin. Keep Star as the clear focal prop.
scenarios.revisionPrompt: Revise the same Star concept in place so the Final Chorus reads as a centered shockwave ring burst instead of a pinwheel spin. Keep Star as the focus and keep the same section scope.

scenarios.analyzePrompt: Analyze the current song for sections, beat windows, phrase cues, and energy shifts.
scenarios.seedPrompt: Design an Outro concept for Snowman with a restrained shimmer texture and gentle animation.
scenarios.revisionPrompt: Revise this Outro Snowman concept in place so it resolves as a solid steady hold with minimal motion. Keep Snowman as the same focal target and do not broaden the scope.
